note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Aegis spells by -10%.
Increases the duration of Aegis spells by 6 sec.
Your Aspect of the Cosmos now stacks 1 additional time.
Aspect of the Cosmos no longer slows enemy movement speed. Instead, your melee and ranged attacks now grant you 5% increased movement speed for 4 seconds, stacking 3 times.
Increases the movement slowing effect of Aspect of the Cosmos by -5% per stack.
Increases the effectiveness of Aspect of the Goddess by 25%.
Healing through Aspect of the Goddess now increases the target's healing taken from you by 1% for 10 sec, stacking up to 10 times.
Increases the bonus healing scaling of Moonwell Splash and the healing done through Aspect of the Goddess by 20%.
Aspect of the Huntress now increases your chance to hit by 3%.
Astral Flares called down by Aspect of the Stars now increase your haste by 3% for 5 seconds, stacking 3 times.
Damage dealt by Aspect of the Stars now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.
Your Warden's Blade now increases the chance to trigger Aspect of the Warden by 10% for 8 seconds.
Increases the damage of Aspect of the Warden by POWER1*0.01, scaling with maximum mana.
Reduces the cooldown of your Aspects by -5 sec.
Increases the effectiveness of Aspects by 15%.
Increases the effectiveness of your Aspects by 20% and their chance to trigger by 10%.

Asteroid Belt.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Every 15 sec, you now gain Asteroid Belt.

In addition, your hit rating is increased by 5% of your Intellect and your expertise is increased by 8.Asteroid BeltBlock rating, parry rating, and block value increased based on how much mana you had when this was applied for 15 seconds.

Astral Aegis.baseDescription:
Drains 30% Maximum Mana
For 10 seconds, direct Magic damage taken will silence the attacker for 1 seconds and deal 57 + 18% arcane SP Arcane damage to them.

Astral Blade.baseDescription:
Drains 25% Maximum Mana
Strike an enemy with precision, dealing 16 + 100% SP + 20% AP Arcane damage, increased further based on your maximum mana.

Increases your dealt to the enemy by 15% for 5 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Astral Blade by 20%.
Reduces the cooldown of Astral Blade by -4 sec.
Increases the duration of Astral Blade by 7 sec.
Critical strikes with Astral Blade now strike 2 additional times, one for 40% of the damage dealt and the other for 20% of the damage dealt.
Dealing damage with Scattered Stars now has a 15% chance to make your next Astral Blade free of cost.
Your Astral Blade now has a 30% chance to reset its own cooldown and refund its maximum mana cost.

Fan of Knives now marks enemies with Vengeance for 10 seconds. Successfully marking an enemy increases the range of your next Astral Blade by 25 yards.

Casting Astral Blade on a marked enemy causes it to deal 30% more damage.

Transform into an Avatar of Vengeance, teleporting to your target and increasing your Intellect by 25% for 30 seconds. 

For the duration, the range of Astral Blade is increased by 30 yards and will teleport you to your target.

If your target is an enemy, you strike them dealing 50 + 22% Intellect + 6.5% arcane SP Arcane damage per 1 sec for 8 seconds, scaling with Intellect.
Astral Flares called down by Aspect of the Stars now increase your haste by 3% for 5 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Astral Reconstitution.baseDescription: Surround yourself with lunar light, causing 30% of damage taken to be converted into mana for 10 seconds.

Blanket of Stars.baseDescription: Cover your shield in a blanket of stars for 8 seconds, increasing your block chance and block value by 100%.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Blanket of Stars by -10 sec.
Increases the duration of Blanket of Stars by 4 sec.

Bonds of Justice.baseDescription:
Send forth bonds of justice to an enemy, tethering them to you for 8 seconds.

If the tether is broken through expiration or the target runs at least 10 yds from you, they are gripped back towards you, taking 441 + 120% arcane SP Arcane damage.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Starfire Shot by 10% against Burning targets.
Increases the damage of Celestial Cleave by 20% and allows it to affect 2 additional enemies.

Celestial Divination.baseDescription: Increases your chance to dodge by 5%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases effectiveness of Celestial Mind by 20%.
Reduces the Energy cost of Celestial Strike and Moon Arrow by -10.

Consuming Scattered Stars now has a 15% chance to transform Celestial Strike into Moonblade for 8 seconds.MoonbladeDevastate an enemy, dealing 130% Weapon Damage plus 100% Intellect Arcane damage and regenerating 15% missing mana.
After using Shooting Star, your next Celestial Strike, Starsunder or auto attack ends the effect to deal 87 + 28.75% arcane SP + 4.65% AP Arcane damage, increased based on distance travelled.

Chosen of the Moon.baseDescription: Become the chosen of the moon, reducing all Physical damage taken by -60% and taunting all enemies within 8 yds for 10 seconds.

Coalesced Resilience.baseDescription: Reduces your damage taken by an amount equal to 1% of your maximum mana.

Constellation Barrier.baseDescription: Reduces all Magic damage taken by -5%.

modifyingTalents.description:
Consumes Scattered Stars
Sweep an enemy and all nearby enemies with your astral blade, dealing 30 + 30% AP + 35% SP Arcane damage.

Every Scattered Star consumed reduces the cooldown of this spell by -3 sec.Consume Scattered StarsDeals 7 + 18.22% SP Arcane Damage and restores 8% maximum mana for each Scattered Star.

Consumes Scattered Stars
Fire an enchanted arrow, dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 62+66+POWER1*0.01 Arcane damage, scaling further based on your maximum mana.Consume Scattered StarsDeals 7 + 18.22% SP Arcane Damage and restores 8% maximum mana for each Scattered Star.

Consumes Scattered Stars
Slash an enemy, dealing 97 + 63.5% arcane SP + 20% AP Arcane damage to them and nearby enemies. Each additional enemy beyond the first takes 20% less damage.

Dealing damage grants you Cosmic Harmony, increasing the healing of your next ability within 6 seconds by 5%.

Effective healing grants you Cosmic Wrath, increasing the damage of your next ability within 6 seconds by 5%.

Cosmic Shift.baseDescription:
Shift the target ally out of the physical plane, granting improved stealth for 10 seconds.

Does not break on damage taken.

modifyingTalents.description: Cosmic Shift now dispels all harmful effects from the target.

Dealing damage grants you Cosmic Harmony, increasing the healing of your next ability within 6 seconds by 5%.

Effective healing grants you Cosmic Wrath, increasing the damage of your next ability within 6 seconds by 5%.

Crystal Shield.baseDescription:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your Stamina by 10% and increases your spell damage by 25% of your attack power.

Dancing in the Moonlight.baseDescription:
Level 50 Passive
Parrying an attack now regenerates 15 of your Energy and deals 65% Weapon Damage to the attacker.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases your healing done by 6%, plus an additional 6% on Poisoned or Diseased targets.

Casting Starfire Shot now has a 20% chance to grant you Drawstring of Elune for 5 sec.Drawstring of Elune (SLS)Huntress Shot and Starcall apply an additional stack of Scattered Stars and your ranged ability attack range is increased to 50 yds.

Applies Eclipsing Arrows to all party and raid members within 40 yds.

Critical strikes with Moonflow and Prayer of Elune now apply Eclipsing Arrows to the target for 20 seconds.

Casting Huntress Shot heals marked allies for 235 + 30% SP.

Elune's Blessing.baseDescription:
Increases party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Elune's Presence.baseDescription: Gain the blessing of a goddess, granting all party or raid members within 40 yds 20% temporary maximum health for 10 seconds.

Enchanted Aegis.baseDescription: Your successful blocks now have a 50% chance to critically block for twice the normal amount.

Enduring Moon.baseDescription: Critical strikes now increase the target's spell damage taken by 10% for 15 seconds.

Explosive Moonlight.baseDescription:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your ranged attack power by 30% of your Intellect and your hit rating by 3% of your Intellect.

Eye of Elune.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike chance by 5%.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Fan of Knives by -5 sec.
Your Fan of Knives now applies an additional stack of Scattered Stars to each enemy struck.

Fan of Knives now marks enemies with Vengeance for 10 seconds. Successfully marking an enemy increases the range of your next Astral Blade by 25 yards.

Casting Astral Blade on a marked enemy causes it to deal 30% more damage.

Flow of Mana.baseDescription: Increases your Intellect and Strength by 10%.

Flow of Waters.baseDescription:
Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 3%.

Font of Magic.baseDescription: Each time you spend a cumulative 100% of your maximum mana, you heal for 4% of your maximum health.

Drains 30% Maximum Mana
Instantly counterattack any enemy that strikes you from the front in melee for Arcane damage, lasting 10 seconds. Can only occur once per sec per enemy.

Usable while stunned.

Moonlit Slumber.baseDescription:
Put an enemy to sleep for 30 seconds (6 sec vs players). Damage dealt will end the effect.

While sleeping, you drain 98 mana from them every 3 sec.

Moonstone Hilt.baseDescription: Increases your parry chance by 5% and block value by 30%.

Moonwalk.baseDescription: Increases your movement speed by 20% at night.

modifyingTalents.description:
Increases your melee haste by 5% and movement speed by 10%.

Movement speed granted by this talent stacks with Moonwalk.

Moonwell.baseDescription:
Creates a zone blessed by moonwell waters for 15 seconds at the target location. 

All allied players standing within the well receive 25% more healing, and their mana regeneration is increased by 100%.

Reverse Magic.baseDescription:
Reverse the next spell cast on you within 3 seconds, reflecting it back to its caster.

Reversing a spell in this way drains 600 + 20% SP of the attacker's mana.

Increases the damage of Trueshot by 25%.

Fan of Knives now marks enemies with Vengeance for 10 seconds. Successfully marking an enemy increases the range of your next Astral Blade by 25 yards.

Casting Astral Blade on a marked enemy causes it to deal 30% more damage.

Vial of Moonwell Water.baseDescription:
Drink from your enchanted moonwell vial, instantly removing all crowd control effects and making you immune to them for 3 seconds.

Usable while stunned, feared, or polymorphed.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Vial of Moonwell Water now additionally heals you equal to 25% of your current mana.

Vigil of the Watchers.baseDescription:
Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Warden's Blade by -5 sec.
Increases the range of Warden's Blade by 20 yds.
Reduces the cooldown of Warden's Blade by -25%.
Your Warden's Blade now increases the chance to trigger Aspect of the Warden by 10% for 8 seconds.
Your Warden's Blade now launches an additional 2 blades at the target, dealing 49 + 24.5% SP Spellstrike Damage.

Increases your critical strike chance by 15% for 10 seconds.

While active, your damaging critical strikes have a 40% chance to trigger Warden's Blade.

Level 50 Passive
Damaging critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of Warden's Blade by -1 sec.

Casting Warden's Blade now grants you Pulverizing Blade.
Pulverizing BladeNext 5 Starsunders within 20 seconds deal increasing damage, scaling with 10% of Intellect, with each subsequent use, stacking 5 times.
Reduces the cooldown of Shadowsong's Mandate by -25% and increases the chance to trigger Warden's Blade by 60%.

Way of the Goddess.baseDescription: Reduces the duration of harmful magic effects on you by -25%.

modifyingTalents.description: Dealing damage with Scattered Stars has a 30% chance to launch a Wisp at your target, dealing 80 + 13.5% arcane SP Arcane damage to nearby enemies.

Wrath of the Moon.baseDescription: Increases your Arcane critical damage dealt by 20%.
